content.fact_text: Implemented the OrderTransitionEngine class to handle order status transitions and financial calculation verification.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides stateless business logic for validating order lifecycle state transitions and verifying high-precision financial integrity using decimal.js.
interfaces: validateTransition(currentStatus: OrderStatus, nextStatus: OrderStatus, context?: { tracking_number?: string }): void
processTransition(orderId: string, currentStatus: OrderStatus, nextStatus: OrderStatus, context?: { tracking_number?: string }): Promise<void>
provenance_data.utility: Provides robust, stateless verification for order state changes and financial correctness, crucial for maintaining ACID-like transactional integrity in the order lifecycle.
